news.t: Worth Charting Announces First Quarterly Distribution Rate for WRTH
Worth Charting Announces First Monthly Distribution Rate for WRTH
Worth Charting Launches WRTH Options Income ETF

holdings.infoBox: WRTH is an equity ETF with a total of 165 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Worth Charting Options Income ETF (WRTH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund sells uncovered short-term call and put options on US-listed large-cap equities from developed countries. The actively managed ETF seeks current income by selling volatility shortly before an equity option's expiry. WRTH was launched on Apr 27, 2026 and is issued by Worth Charting.

data.text: Carter Braxton Worth stops by the Schwab Network NYSE set to discuss using individual stock volatility to generate options income. He speaks about his recently launched Worth Charting Options Income E...

data.title: Worth Charting Launches WRTH Options Income ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $WRTH--Worth Charting launches WRTH ETF, an actively managed fund using options strategies to generate income by selling volatility after sharp market moves.
